card.name: Warhorse
card.bonus: +14 with any Leader or Wizard

card.name: Forge
card.bonus: +9 for each Weapon and Artifact

card.name: Fountain of Life
card.bonus: Adds base strength of one Weapon, Flood, Flame, Land, or Weather

card.name: Magic Wand
card.bonus: +25 with any Wizard

card.name: Mountain
card.bonus: Clears penalties on Floods

card.name: Bell Tower
card.bonus: +15 with any Wizard

card.name: Book of Changes
card.bonus: May change the suit of one other card

card.name: Warlock Lord
card.penalty: -10 for each Leader and other Wizard

card.name: Cavern
card.bonus: +25 with Dragon or Dwarvish Infantry; clears penalties on Weather

card.name: Basilisk
card.penalty: Blanks all Armies, Leaders, and other Beasts

card.name: Air Elemental
card.bonus: +15 for each Weather

card.name: Elven Archers
card.bonus: +5 for each Weather

card.name: Necromancer
card.bonus: May take one Army, Leader, Wizard, or Beast from discard at end

card.name: Great Flood
card.penalty: Blanks all Armies, Lands, and Flames

card.name: World Tree
card.bonus: +50 if every card has a different suit

card.name: Gem of Order
card.bonus: +10 for 3-card run, +30 for 4-card run, +60 for 5-card run, +100 for 6-card run, +150 for 7-card run

card.name: Rangers
card.bonus: Clears the word Army from all penalties

card.name: Princess
card.bonus: +8 for each Army, Wizard, and other Leader

card.name: Illusionist
card.bonus: +15 with any Weather; clears penalties on Weather

card.name: Wildfire
card.penalty: Blanks all cards except Flames, Wizards, Weather, Weapons, Artifacts, Mountain, Great Flood, Island, Unicorn, and Dragon

card.name: Sword of Keth
card.bonus: +10 with any Leader; +40 instead with Shield of Keth and any Leader

card.name: Candle
card.bonus: +100 with Book of Changes, Bell Tower, and any Wizard

card.name: Lightning
card.bonus: +30 with Rainstorm

card.name: Earth Elemental
card.bonus: +15 for each Land

card.name: Whirlwind
card.bonus: +40 with Rainstorm and either Blizzard or Great Flood

card.name: Forest
card.bonus: +12 for each Beast and Elven Archers

card.name: Elven Longbow
card.bonus: +30 with Elven Archers, Warlord, or Beastmaster

card.name: Shield of Keth
card.bonus: +15 with any Leader; +40 instead with Sword of Keth and any Leader

card.name: Empress
card.bonus: +10 for each Army

card.name: Water Elemental
card.bonus: +15 for each Flood

card.name: Dwarvish Infantry
card.bonus: +10 for each other Army

card.name: Protection Rune
card.bonus: Clears penalties on all cards

card.name: Warlord
card.bonus: +4 for each Army

card.name: Queen
card.bonus: +5 for each Army; +20 for each Army if with King

card.name: Beastmaster
card.bonus: +9 for each Beast

card.name: King
card.bonus: +5 for each Army; +20 for each Army if with Queen

card.name: Enchantress
card.bonus: +5 for each Land, Weather, and Beast

card.name: Unicorn
card.bonus: +30 with Princess; +15 with Empress, Queen, or Enchantress

card.name: Rainstorm
card.bonus: +10 for each Flood

card.name: Fire Elemental
card.bonus: +15 for each Flame

card.name: Island
card.bonus: Clears penalty on one Flood or Flame

card.name: Hydra
card.bonus: +28 with Swamp

card.name: Blizzard
card.penalty: Blanks all Floods; -5 for each Army, Leader, Beast, and Flame
